title: Revert "spec: bind mount /sys only for rootless containers"
body:
It breaks "podman  run --net=host --uidmap=0:1:70000 --gidmap=0:20000:70000 busybox echo hi"

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>
